headline: I Can't Hear My Family Anymore—Is My Job to Blame?
articleBody: That constant ringing in your ears isn't just "part of the job." If loud machinery or constant noise has damaged your hearing, you’re likely entitled to benefits. Many workers wait too long because the change is gradual. Don't let your employer claim it's just "old age." If you’re struggling to follow conversations, it’s time to see what your claim is worth.
